docket_entries.description: SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFER, CARIN AS TO DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-26-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY HOFER, CARIN AS TO DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-26-2015 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED APR-30-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC.
RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED, UNABLE TO FORWARD

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-26-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-26-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM DAVID LAVINE. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF, ONLY. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID LAVINE. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE DAVID LAVINE. FILED BY HOFER, CARIN

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOFER, CARIN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC. $10,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $10,105.00, RETURN OF $6,000 + $4,000 FOR BAD FAITH PURSUANT TO C.C. SECTION 1950.5; DEFENDANT DID NOT APPEAR AND SO WAIVED ANY DEFENSE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOFER, CARIN AS TO DEFENDANT JOCAFO, LLC.
